plot_hooks.title: Plot Hook Title
plot_hooks.type: Hook Type (e.g., Secret/Alliance, Rescue/Investigation, Territory Defense)
plot_hooks.difficulty: Easy | Medium | Hard | Easy to Medium | Medium to Hard
plot_hooks.setup: Initial situation or context that introduces the hook
plot_hooks.hook: The specific moment or event that draws PCs into the plot
objectives: Primary goal the PCs should aim for
complications: Complication that raises the stakes or introduces tension
plot_hooks.opportunity: Optional: What opportunity this hook presents to PCs
plot_hooks.value: Optional: The value or benefit this hook provides
twist_options: Optional: Alternative twist or reveal option 1
Optional: Alternative twist or reveal option 2
plot_hooks.character_moment: Optional: A key character development moment
plot_hooks.twist: Optional: A twist or reveal that changes the direction
hook_options: Optional: Alternative ways the hook can be presented
plot_hooks.pc_involvement: Optional: How PCs become involved or their role
plot_hooks.stakes: Optional: What happens if characters succeed or fail
role_for_pcs: Optional: Specific roles PCs can take
plot_hooks.deeper_layer: Optional: Additional layer or hidden element
plot_hooks.the_task: Optional: A specific task that must be completed
task_examples: Optional: Examples of tasks that fit this hook
plot_hooks.complication: Optional: Single complication (alternative to complications array)
failure_points: Optional: Specific points where things can go wrong

meta_hooks.title: Meta Hook Title
meta_hooks.description: Description of how this meta hook works across multiple sessions or hooks
themes: Optional: Themes for the meta hook

usage_notes.scaling: How this hook can scale from single session to multi-session arc
usage_notes.combination: How multiple hooks can be combined or run in parallel
usage_notes.character_growth: How these hooks push character development in various directions
